title: Extended Terminal
description: Expands the AE2 terminal with other mods.
body:
Extended Terminal

Extended Terminal adds another mod's Crafting Terminal. ## Feature - EMI/JEI support for experiences like the AE2's Crafting Terminal - The Ultimate All-in-One: Crafting, Smithing, Stonecutting, and Anvil—All in a single terminal - Go Beyond 3x3: Integrated support for extended crafting and custom grid sizes. - You can add **Extended Terminal** to your modpack. ## Support Terminal | Mod | Version | Wireless Terminal | |----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------|---------------------------| | Extended Terminal | 1.21.1 | ✔️ | | [Re:Avaritia](https://modrinth.com/mod/re-avaritia) | 1.21.1, 1.20.1 | ❌ | | [AvaritiaNeo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/avaritianeo) | 1.21.1, 1.20.1 | ❌ | | [Extended Crafting](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-crafting) | 1.21.1, 1.20.1 | ❌ | | Extended Crafting: Expanded | 1.20.1 | ❌ | ## Integrated My Mod: | Mod | Version | fully support | |--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------|---------------| |[AE2 Tangible Bookmarks](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2-tangible-bookmarks) | 1.21.1, 1.20.1 | ✔️ | |[AE2 Fluid Crafting Terminal](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2-fluid-crafting-terminal) | 1.21.1 | ✔️ |
